title: Navigating Coronation Group Ecosystem, Insight & Opportunities - FinancialEDGE
description: The Coronation Group CEO's shared valuable insights on the company's ecosystem in an engagement with the media in Lagos, emphasizing the importance of shaping conversations and building connections. html:
The Coronation Group CEO’s shared valuable insights on the company’s ecosystem in an engagement with the media in Lagos, emphasizing the importance of shaping conversations and building connections.

According to the Group Managing Director  / Chief Executive Officer, Wole Onasanya, Coronation Group is a leading African financial services conglomerate that offers a comprehensive suite of services, including asset management, banking, insurance, and technology.

Coronation Group leverages technology to deliver innovative financial solutions. The company’s values are built on, Trust,  Innovation, and Leadership.

Coronation Group’s diverse portfolio includes 12 subsidiaries, such as:

1. Coronation Group Limited

2. Coronation Asset Management Limited

3. Coronation Capital Limited

4. Coronation Insurance Ghana Limited

5. Coronation Insurance Plc

6. Coronation Life Assurance Limited

7.  Coronation Merchant Bank Limited

8. Coronation Registrars Limited

9. Coronation Securities Limited

10. Coronation Trustees Limited

11.  Fiducia Limited

12. Trium Limited

“We are a leading African financial services conglomerate primarily engaged in investment management. Through our technology-enabled ecosystem, we offer a comprehensive suite of asset management, banking, insurance, and technology services.” Ngozi Akinyele, Chief Marketing & Communications Officer, Coronation Group.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Ngozi Akinyele, Chief Marketing &
Communications Officer, Coronation Group and Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director, Financial Edge at the Coronation CEO’s media engagement in Lagos.
